queries.question: Show all reporters and only those photographers who worked on articles with a deadline of April 28th 2020.
queries.sql:
SELECT Reporters.name
FROM Articles JOIN Reporters ON Articles.reporter_id = Reporters.id
UNION
SELECT Photographers.name
FROM Articles JOIN Photographers ON Articles.photographer_id = Photographers.id
WHERE Articles.deadline = "2020-04-28"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?articles a :Articles .
    ?reporters a :Reporters .
    ?articles p:hasReporters ?reporters .
    ?reporters p:name ?name .
    BIND(?name AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?articles a :Articles .
    ?photographers a :Photographers .
    ?articles p:hasPhotographers ?photographers .
    ?photographers p:name ?name .
    ?articles p:deadline ?deadline_f .
    FILTER(STR(?deadline_f) = "2020-04-28")
    BIND(?name AS ?o0)
  }
}

queries.question: Show reporters and photographers both who worked on articles with a deadline of April 28th 2020.
queries.sql:
SELECT Reporters.name
FROM Articles JOIN Reporters ON Articles.reporter_id = Reporters.id
WHERE Articles.deadline = "2020-04-28"
UNION
SELECT Photographers.name
FROM Articles JOIN Photographers ON Articles.photographer_id = Photographers.id
WHERE Articles.deadline = "2020-04-28"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?articles a :Articles .
    ?reporters a :Reporters .
    ?articles p:hasReporters ?reporters .
    ?reporters p:name ?name .
    ?articles p:deadline ?deadline_f .
    FILTER(STR(?deadline_f) = "2020-04-28")
    BIND(?name AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?articles a :Articles .
    ?photographers a :Photographers .
    ?articles p:hasPhotographers ?photographers .
    ?photographers p:name ?name .
    ?articles p:deadline ?deadline_f .
    FILTER(STR(?deadline_f) = "2020-04-28")
    BIND(?name AS ?o0)
  }
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Give me reporters and photographers who worked on articles with a deadline of April 28th 2020.
